segments.instruction: Jump from the platform

parsed.thought: The sequence shows a humanoid figure performing a single, continuous action: jumping off a platform. Frame 0: Figure is crouched on the platform. Frame 1: Figure is in a preparatory crouch, beginning the jump. Frame 2: Figure is mid-air, arms raised. Frame 3: Figure is higher in the air, still airborne. Frame 4: Figure is descending, about to land. Frame 5: Figure has landed and is in a landing crouch. Frames 6-7: Figure remains in the crouched/leaning position on the floor, having completed the jump. There is no interaction with any object (like picking up or placing an item). The entire sequence is one atomic task: 'Jump from the platform'. No switch occurs because there is no change in the manipulated object; the figure is only interacting with its own body to perform the jump.
instructions: Jump from the platform

segments.instruction: Sit on the cube

parsed.thought: The sequence shows a humanoid figure standing, then bending, and finally sitting on a cube. The figure is interacting with the cube (a static object) throughout the entire sequence. The action is a continuous motion of sitting down: standing (frame 0), leaning forward (frame 2), lowering into a seated position (frames 3-5), and remaining seated (frames 6-7). Since the figure never releases or disengages from the cube and then moves to interact with a different object, there are no atomic task boundaries or switches. The entire sequence is one continuous action of sitting on the cube.
instructions: Sit on the cube
